summary: Post CRA→Vite migration smoke test. Backend endpoints healthy; frontend served by Vite loads all pages; full auth + create-journal E2E works end-to-end.
passed: File layout: /app/frontend/index.html + src/main.jsx + src/App.jsx exist; craco.config.js, public/index.html, src/index.js NOT present
package.json: vite 5.4.11 + @vitejs/plugin-react 4.3.4 present; no react-scripts / @craco/craco / cra-template / @emergentbase deps
vite.config.js: @→src alias, REACT_APP_* exposed via define, host 0.0.0.0:3000
postcss.config.cjs and tailwind.config.cjs exist (correct for type:module)
Backend POST /api/auth/login (admin@tradejournal.com / Admin@123) → 200 with access_token + user payload
Frontend Landing (/) renders — title 'Trade Journal', hero visible, no JSX/PostCSS/ajv errors
Frontend /login renders with data-testid=input-email and input-password
Login flow → redirects to /dashboard, 'Welcome back' toast shown
/dashboard/new form renders (Trade date, Stock/Ticker, Trade setup select, Chart upload, Trade logic textarea)
Create journal (TSLA + Breakout + logic) succeeds — 'Journal saved' toast, redirect to /dashboard/:id detail page with Edit/Delete buttons
Dashboard now shows 'You have 1 journal' with TSLA card + Breakout tag
Protected route: clearing cookies then visiting /dashboard redirects to /login
Only two 401s in console for /api/auth/me on landing (documented as expected)
